nodes.name: candidate-playbook.md
nodes.summary: Defines the 'Maintainer-Owned Stale Salvage' playbook: a reusable process for recovering useful work from stale or conflicted closed PRs via maintainer-owned branches with attribution and validation gates.

nodes.name: report.json
nodes.summary: Evaluator-RAG prototype run report for the stale-PR-salvage scenario, recording pass/fail result, per-dimension scores, findings with severity, and the recommended next action.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a versioned schema key (ecc.evaluator-rag.report.v1) — part of ECC's structured evaluator artifact format.

nodes.name: scenario.json
nodes.summary: Defines the evaluator-RAG scenario for stale-PR salvage, specifying sources to retrieve, retrieval questions, forbidden actions, and acceptance gates that a candidate playbook must satisfy.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a versioned schema key (ecc.evaluator-rag.scenario.v1); the sources array mixes repo docs and GitHub PR URLs as retrieval targets.

nodes.name: trace.json
nodes.summary: Step-by-step execution trace of the evaluator-RAG prototype run, recording the observation, retrieval, proposal, verification, and promotion phases with evidence references for each phase.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a versioned schema key (ecc.evaluator-rag.trace.v1); the events array provides an ordered audit trail of the agent reasoning phases.

nodes.name: verifier-result.json
nodes.summary: Verifier output for the evaluator-RAG prototype run, scoring two candidate playbooks (accepted: maintainer-salvage-branch at 0.94; rejected: blind-cherry-pick-translations at 0.21) with per-reason justification and rollback instructions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a versioned schema key (ecc.evaluator-rag.verifier.v1); candidate scoring with rollback instructions makes this a machine-readable decision record.
